caribbean.headline: Martinique Heavy Rain and 2.6 ft Seas
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing persistent heavy rain with 100% rain probability, east-southeast winds to 13 kt, and seas to 2.6 ft with a dominant SE swell period of 6 s. I am monitoring impacts for the Port of Fort-de-France and note Roatan has higher winds near 20 kt, so mariners should expect reduced visibility and choppy approaches from the SE swell.

mediterranean.headline: Westerly Seas Rock Marseille with 25 kt Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing WSW-dominant swell with sustained winds near 25 kt, significant wave heights around 4.7 ft and a 5 s swell period, with less than 10% rain probability. I advise Small Craft Advisory-level caution for local approaches and ship operations; Mykonos is also seeing 21 kt winds and similar short-period seas.
